short: A rating system, borrowed from chess, that ranks models from pairwise win-loss results.
definition: Elo rating is a system, originally developed for chess, that produces relative rankings from head-to-head comparisons. In model evaluation, each model starts at a base score and gains or loses points after each matchup, with the adjustment scaled by how expected the result was. This yields a stable ranking without needing every model to be compared directly against every other.
